name: anti-hall
description: Verify-first discipline for Claude Code. SessionStart injects the full Iron-Law + rationalization-table protocol and a skill primer (and re-injects it after compaction, since SessionStart re-fires with source=compact); a per-turn UserPromptSubmit hook adds a short varying nudge. Skills: root-cause debugging, orchestration (non-blocking swarm), plan-first deadly-loop-gated feature-launch, deadly-loop. Ships git-guard, task discipline, optional graphify hooks, and a monorepo/simple statusline (plus a repo-root AGENTS.md Codex mirror for clone-based use — not bundled by /plugin install). All hooks and the statusline are pure Node (built-ins only) and run unchanged on Windows, macOS, and Linux. REQUIRES Node.js >= 18 on PATH: hooks are launched as `node <hook>.js`; without Node, the hooks (including the git-guard safety) silently do not run (intentional — a shell-based preflight cannot reach stock Windows systems, so we omit it by design). Verify with `node --version` before relying on protections.
